name: Stalwart Guard
text: Defender. While this is in play, adjacent allies take 1 less damage.

name: Swift Scout
text: Haste. Draw a card when this enters play.

name: Healing Light
text: Restore 5 health to a unit or player.

name: Ancient Dragon
text: Flying. When this attacks, deal 2 damage to all enemy units.

name: Market Square
text: At the start of your turn, gain 1 gold.
